positive: A minimalist, stylized celestial map composition. The main subject is a constellation of glowing, interconnected abstract geometric shapes (representing stars and planets) forming a recognizable yet non-copyrighted zodiac motif. The style is clean line art combined with soft bioluminescent watercolor washes, giving it a dreamy, cosmic feel. Use deep indigo and cosmic teal as the primary background colors, contrasted sharply with glowing gold and ethereal lavender highlights for the celestial elements. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for a single-color print on fabric. Emphasis on negative space and crisp silhouettes. Ideal for a forest of stars aesthetic.
